mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id IN
#{id}
SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
